title: ACE Urges State Department to Prioritize Student Visa Processing Ahead of Fall
summary_en: ACE and 31 other national higher education associations are urging the State Department in a May 5 letter to prioritize student and scholar visa processing during the peak season of spring-through-August.
title_cn: 美国教育委员会敦促国务院优先办理秋季学期前学生签证

title: ACE’s Building Pathways Initiative Examines the Ecosystem of Economic Growth Through Higher Education in Pennsylvania
summary_en: The current successes and unlimited potential of higher education as an economic engine driving development and strengthening communities throughout Pennsylvania were the focuses of an April 28 convening of ACE’s Building Pathways initiative.
title_cn: 美国教育理事会“通路建设倡议”项目调研宾夕法尼亚州高等教育赋能经济增长生态体系
summary_cn: 近期，美国教育理事会依托其实施的“通路建设倡议”项目，正式启动对宾夕法尼亚州依托高等教育推动经济增长的整体生态体系的专项调研工作，全面梳理该州高等教育资源与区域经济发展需求的对接机制，系统评估相关实践成效。
